selections.exampleHtml:
PI 28
Roadmap Initiative
Maintainability Enhancements
Technology Upgrades & Technical Debt Reduction · Solon Tax 2026
4,580
Total Hours
10
Features
GRC
Requester

Strategic Case
01
Tech Debt Reduction
Restructures revenue-management-be-custom to hexagonal architecture, improving maintainability and reducing long-term technical debt across all delivery teams.
02
Critical Platform Upgrades
Implements Java 25, Spring Boot 4.x, and Oracle 26ai to keep the platform secure, supported, and performant for current and future jurisdictions.
03
Configuration Management
Introduces a dedicated Config Items Management tool for safely packaging and migrating configurations across environments without manual risk.
Key Features
Hexagonal Architecture Refactor
Restructure revenue-management-be-custom to clean hexagonal architecture with improved separation of concerns, enhanced testability, and reduced coupling.
In Design 1,200h
Java 25 Upgrade
Migrate codebase to Java 25 to leverage virtual threads, pattern matching, and significant performance improvements for high-volume tax operations.
In Progress 640h
Spring Boot 4.x Migration
Upgrade to Spring Boot 4.x with enhanced observability, native compilation support, improved dependency management, and critical security patches.
In Progress 480h
Oracle 26ai Database Migration
Migrate to Oracle 26ai to harness AI-powered query optimisation, advanced analytics, and improved performance for high-volume tax transaction processing.
To Do 420h
Cross-Team UI Tech Debt
Systematic UI improvements and technical debt reduction spanning ATH, EOS, SPA, HEL, and DAID teams for long-term platform sustainability.
In Progress 220h
Config Items Management Tool
Dedicated tool for safely packaging, versioning, and migrating configurations across development, staging, and production without manual intervention.
In Design 380h
Solon Tax Product Roadmap 2026 Netcompany

{"slides":{"slide_1":{"instances":[{"auto_div_header":"
PI 28
Roadmap Initiative
Accessibility
Non-Functional Requirement Coverage · Solon Tax 2026
269
Total Hours
7
Features
Other, GRC
Requester
","auto_div_body":"
Strategic Case
01
Regulatory Compliance and Legal Obligation
WCAG 2.1 AA and EN 301 549 standards mandate accessible systems for all users globally.
02
Inclusive User Experience Across Abilities
Accessibility improvements ensure revenue authority users and taxpayers of all abilities interact effectively.
03
Platform Maturity and Market Competitiveness
Accessibility enhancements strengthen Solon Tax market position and demonstrate commitment to inclusive design.
Key Features
Accessibility Improvements (Current PI28)
Improve accessibility of Solon Tax application in alignment with WCAG 2.1 AA and EN 301 549 guidelines.
To Do TBD
Accessibility Improvements - DAID (Current PI28)
Improve accessibility of Solon Tax application in alignment with WCAG 2.1 AA and EN 301 549 guidelines.
To Do 90h
Accessibility Improvements - HEL (Current PI28)
Improve accessibility of Solon Tax application in alignment with WCAG 2.1 AA and EN 301 549 guidelines.
To Do TBD
Accessibility Improvements - SPA (Current PI28)
Improve accessibility of Solon Tax application in alignment with WCAG 2.1 AA and EN 301 549 guidelines.
To Do 90h
Accessibility Improvements - EOS (Current PI28)
Improve accessibility of Solon Tax application in alignment with WCAG 2.1 AA and EN 301 549 guidelines.
To Do TBD
Accessibility Improvements - ATH (Current PI28)
Improve accessibility of Solon Tax application in alignment with WCAG 2.1 AA and EN 301 549 guidelines.
To Do 90h
","auto_div_slide_footer":"Solon Tax Product Roadmap 2026 Netcompany"},{"auto_div_header":"
PI 28
Roadmap Initiative
EXTENSIBILITY
NON-FUNCTIONAL REQUIREMENT COVERAGE · Solon Tax 2026
157
Total Hours
2
Features
GRC
Requester
","auto_div_body":"
Strategic Case
01
Enable Custom Business Logic Without Core Modification
Data area extensibility allows implementations to add custom fields and characteristics without modifying product code.
02
Support Diverse Implementation Requirements
Financial transaction type customization enables projects to capture domain-specific metadata and business rules flexibly.
03
Reduce Technical Debt and Maintenance Burden
Extensible architecture patterns reduce future refactoring costs and enable faster project delivery cycles.
Key Features
Enable user-defined characteristics (Data Area) for Financial transaction Type
Allow revenue authority admins to extend financial transaction type data schema with custom fields and characteristics.
HLD 157h
Define User-Defined Characteristics for Payment Event - Admin
Enable admins to define and maintain user-defined characteristics for payment events with validation and grouping.
Waiting Analysis Approval TBD
","auto_div_slide_footer":"Solon Tax Product Roadmap 2026 Netcompany"},{"auto_div_header":"
PI 28
Roadmap Initiative
MAINTAINABILITY
NON-FUNCTIONAL REQUIREMENT COVERAGE · Solon Tax 2026
4,580
Total Hours
15
Features
Other, GRC
Requester
","auto_div_body":"
Strategic Case
01
Reduce Technical Debt and Architectural Decay
ArchUnit enforcement and hexagonal architecture alignment prevent code drift and maintain long-term system health.
02
Improve Developer Experience and Onboarding
Enhanced local setup, programming guidelines, and CI/CD optimization reduce friction and accelerate team productivity.
03
Enable Sustainable Long-Term Product Evolution
Configuration management, documentation integration, and code quality standards establish foundation for scalable growth.
Key Features
POC/Fixed effort - Config Items Management (Packaging & versioning): Enable delivery teams to safely and selectively migrate configurations across environments
Enable delivery teams to safely migrate configurations across environments with versioning, dependency checks, and rollback capabilities.
Waiting Analysis Approval 2,240h
After POC - Config Items Management (Packaging & versioning): Enable delivery teams to safely and selectively migrate configurations across environments /WIP
Post-POC configuration management implementation with enhanced governance, approval flows, and operational reporting.
To Do 1,280h
Introduce ArchUnit
Integrate ArchUnit library to automatically enforce architectural guidelines and prevent code violations in CI/CD pipeline.
In Design 373h
Restructure revenue-management-be-custom to align with Hexagonal Architecture
Restructure custom module to follow hexagonal architecture principles and align with main product standards.
To Do 21h
Extend Length in Comment Fields Across Entities
Expand comment field character limits from 255 to 2000 characters across all system entities.
Waiting Analysis Approval 21h
Integrate Self-Contained Documentation Portal into Solon Tax Deliverable
Package and deploy self-contained documentation portal within standard Solon Tax product deliverables for offline access.
To Do 48h
","auto_div_slide_footer":"Solon Tax Product Roadmap 2026 Netcompany"},{"auto_div_header":"
PI 28
Roadmap Initiative
OPERABILITY
NON-FUNCTIONAL REQUIREMENT COVERAGE
60
Total Hours
1
Features
GRC
Requester
","auto_div_body":"
Strategic Case
01
Enable Flexible Service Integration Architecture
Proxy service capabilities allow self-service and revenue management systems to call backend APIs and third-party services generically.
02
Support Cross-System Validation and Data Exchange
Service proxy pattern enables real-time validation from external systems during form creation and entity operations.
03
Reduce Custom Integration Development Effort
Generic proxy service framework eliminates need for custom point-to-point integrations for each external system.
Key Features
Call proxy services /RM & SS - Documentation
Enable generic proxy service calls from self-service and revenue management to backend APIs and third-party systems.
Ready for Dev 60h
","auto_div_slide_footer":"Solon Tax Product Roadmap 2026 Netcompany"},{"auto_div_header":"
PI 28
Roadmap Initiative
Performance Efficiency
Non-Functional Requirement Coverage · Solon Tax 2026
955
Total Hours
5
Features
Other, GRC
Requester
","auto_div_body":"
Strategic Case
01
Resolve Known Task Assignment Performance Bottlenecks
Measure and fix performance issues in task assignment functionality to support peak volumes of 5000 tasks per hour.
02
Optimize Reference Data Retrieval at Scale
Implement caching layer for static reference data to eliminate redundant database queries and improve system responsiveness.
03
Establish Green Coding and Resource Optimization Standards
Define green coding guidelines and CI/CD optimizations to reduce resource consumption and environmental impact.
Key Features
Performance -Work on the known issues with performance in tasks assignment
Measure, investigate, and fix known performance issues in task assignment functionality for high-volume scenarios.
Waiting Analysis Approval38h
Reference Data - Implement Enhanced Caching for Reference Data Microservice
Implement caching layer in reference data microservice to eliminate redundant database queries for static datasets.
Waiting Solution Approval224h
Green coding Programming Guidelines
Define and document green coding principles for Java, JavaScript, Rego, Drools, Helm, Maven, SQL, and Liquibase.
To Do224h
Green coding CI/CD flow optimization
Review and optimize CI/CD processes to reduce build frequency, optimize caching, and improve resource utilization.
To Do21h
Performance improvements (Current PI28)
Address performance issues and optimize system responsiveness across Solon Tax application.
To Do448h
","auto_div_slide_footer":"Solon Tax Product Roadmap 2026Netcompany"},{"auto_div_header":"
PI 28
Roadmap Initiative
RELIABILITY
NON-FUNCTIONAL REQUIREMENT COVERAGE · Solon Tax 2026
2,688
Total Hours
2
Features
Other
Requester
","auto_div_body":"
Strategic Case
01
Ensure Data Integrity in Distributed Transactions
Implement strong error handling for synchronous operations spanning multiple microservices to prevent data inconsistency.
02
Support Concurrent Record Modifications Safely
Optimistic locking with version control prevents conflicts when multiple users or processes modify records simultaneously.
03
Build Trust in System Data Accuracy
Robust error handling and conflict resolution mechanisms ensure revenue authority can rely on system data integrity.
Key Features
Data Integrity improvements. Error handling in synchronous operations that involve distributed transactions / Registry, Taxpayer
Introduce strong error handling for synchronous operations involving distributed transactions across registry and taxpayer microservices.
HLD 1493h
Record Locking - Apply logic to Party record
Implement optimistic locking mechanism for party records to manage concurrent modifications and prevent data conflicts.
In Design 1195h
","auto_div_slide_footer":"Solon Tax Product Roadmap 2026 Netcompany"},{"auto_div_header":"
PI 28
Roadmap Initiative
Security
Non-Functional Requirement Coverage · [DATA MISSING]
2,759
Total Hours
8
Features
GRC
Requester
","auto_div_body":"
Strategic Case
01
Enforce GDPR Compliance and Data Protection
Restrict access to sensitive personal data through classification levels and role-based permissions to ensure regulatory compliance.
02
Prevent Unauthorized Access and Data Breaches
Row-level security, data masking, and hierarchical permissions reduce risk of unauthorized access to sensitive information.
03
Secure Configuration and API Request Handling
Harden API requests with expression patterns and configure publicly available items to prevent injection attacks and data exposure.
Key Features
Data Security - Restrict Access to Personal Data GDPR- Admin (based on data classifications) - Part 1/4
Restrict access to sensitive personal data based on classification levels and user access groups with masking and visibility controls.
Waiting Analysis Approval 1,217h
PenTest - Harden API requests with expression patterns allowed
Add regular expressions to API input parameters to prevent injection attacks and restrict allowed input patterns.
Ready for Dev 80h
Data Security - Define Access per user access group per classification level - Part 2/4
Define classification permissions per user access group with read, search, update, delete, and create operations.
Waiting Analysis Approval 396h
Data Security - Restrict Access to Personal Data GDPR- Admin (based on data classifications) - Encrypt/decrypt - Part 4/4
Enable encryption and decryption of sensitive personal data in logs, audit trails, and system records.
To Do 42h
Data Security - Restrict Access to Personal Data GDPR- Admin (based on data classifications) - Part 3/4
Restrict access to sensitive personal data in logs, security logs, audit logs, and access logs based on classification levels.
Under Analysis 396h
SS enhancements -Configure the items that can be publicly available in db level Part 2/2
Enable admins to configure which reference data, translation items, and services can be publicly available.
In Design 534h
","auto_div_slide_footer":"Solon Tax Product Roadmap 2026 Netcompany"},{"auto_div_header":"
PI 28
Roadmap Initiative
TEST SUITE OPTIMIZATION
NON-FUNCTIONAL REQUIREMENT COVERAGE · Solon Tax 2026
860
Total Hours
6
Features
Other
Requester
","auto_div_body":"
Strategic Case
01
Establish Comprehensive Self-Service Testing Coverage
Automation testing for self-service APIs, authentication, forms, and human tasks ensures quality and prevents regressions.
02
Maintain Product Quality Across Delivery Teams
Test maintenance and regression testing across multiple teams ensures consistent quality standards and prevents defect leakage.
03
Support Continuous Integration and Deployment Confidence
Robust test suite enables safe, frequent releases and provides early detection of integration issues.
Key Features
Automation testing for SS /WIP
